errorMessage.title: errorMessage
errorMessage.description: Populated only when status is Error. Surface this text to the user when the visit could not be created.

output.title: output
output.description: Legacy text output kept for backward compatibility. Do not use in agent responses — prefer status, visitName, and errorMessage instead.

status.title: status
status.description: Either 'Success' or 'Error'. Drives the branching in topic Instruction 6.

visitId.title: visitId
visitId.description: The Id of the newly created Visit__c record. Used to build a clickable link in the confirmation card on the Employee Agent.

visitName.title: visitName
visitName.description: The auto-number Name of the new Visit__c (e.g., V-00123). Display this in the confirmation.
